skinme.title: Skin Me
skinme.author: Mary-Ann Black
skinme.description: A whip with a bone handle. A girl named Rita in Berlin. She should never have touched it.

carryme.title: Carry Me
carryme.author: Mary-Ann Black
carryme.description: The wig has been watching. Auburn curls like fire frozen mid-fall.

muetter.title: Warum Mütter töten?
muetter.author: Mary-Ann Black
muetter.description: The hourglass. The sand flows upward. Time moves backward.

layme.title: Lay Me
layme.author: Mary-Ann Black
layme.description: 79 cards. One more than standard. The extra card has no name.

spinme.title: Spin Me
spinme.author: Mary-Ann Black
spinme.description: The pointe shoes remember every dancer who bled in them.
